title: Idea Options
description: Set of execution-concept variants produced by idea-director. Each concept is a distinct creative treatment of the same approved arc — concepts must NOT differ in arc_type, beat structure, emotional targets, or hook_mechanic. The user picks one via selected_concept_id.

concepts.description: 2–3 execution-concept variants. Idea-director generates this set then waits for user selection.

id.description: Concept id, format C<n> (e.g. C1, C2, C3).

selected.description: True for the chosen concept; exactly one concept in the array should have selected=true.

hook_execution.description: How the locked hook_mechanic lands in this specific treatment — first 3 seconds described.

visual_metaphor.description: Central image that carries the story through all beats.

beat_mapping.description: Map of beat-id (B1, B2, ...) to what specifically happens in this scenario.

why_this_works.description: One sentence connecting the concept to intelligence findings.

knowledge_alignment_refs.description: Canonical producer-knowledge refs that shape this concept. Use an empty array only when no selected knowledge refs apply.

selected_concept_id.description: ID of the concept the user chose — must match an entry in concepts[].id.
